shop.name: SweetlyHannahMade
shop.tagline: Handmade with love, stitch by stitch
shop.announcement: Free pattern with every plushie purchase!
shop.about: Hi, I'm Hannah! I'm a passionate crocheter who loves bringing adorable characters to life. Every plushie and pattern is made with care and lots of love.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: The bunny plushie is absolutely adorable. The quality is amazing!

testimonials.name: Jessica L.
testimonials.text: The pattern was so well written and easy to follow.

testimonials.name: Emily R.
testimonials.text: Hannah is so talented. I've bought three plushies now!

categories.name: Crochet Patterns
categories.description: Downloadable PDF patterns for all skill levels

categories.name: Plushies
categories.description: Handmade crochet plushies, ready to ship

products.name: Bunny Amigurumi Pattern
products.description:
This beginner-friendly bunny pattern will guide you through creating the most adorable little bunny!

**What's included:**
- 10-page PDF pattern
- Full photo tutorial
- Yarn and materials list
- Finished size: approx. 6 inches tall

products.name: Teddy Bear Plushie
products.description:
A handmade teddy bear crocheted with soft, high-quality yarn.

**Details:**
- Premium acrylic yarn
- Safety eyes
- Approx. 8 inches tall
- Ships within 3-5 business days
